finance_leadership_governance.name: Leadership & Governance
finance_leadership_governance.description: Leadership of the Federal Ministry of Finance and related agencies. Includes the Minister of Finance, CBN Governor, monetary policy decisions, and economic management team activities.

macroeconomic_indicators.name: Macroeconomic Indicators
macroeconomic_indicators.description: Key indicators of the Nigerian economy. Covers inflation rate, GDP growth, exchange rate (Naira vs Dollar), external reserves, and unemployment rate.

revenue_taxation.name: Revenue & Taxation
revenue_taxation.description: Government revenue generation and tax administration. Includes FIRS (Federal Inland Revenue Service), VAT, Company Income Tax, Stamp Duty, and TSA (Treasury Single Account).

development_finance_institutions.name: Development Finance Institutions
development_finance_institutions.description: State-owned financial institutions supporting development. Includes Bank of Industry (BOI), NEXIM Bank, Development Bank of Nigeria (DBN), and Bank of Agriculture interventions.

digital_finance_fintech.name: Digital Finance & Fintech
digital_finance_fintech.description: Financial technology and digital currency. Covers eNaira, cashless policy, crypto regulation, fintech startups, and electronic payment systems.

infrastructure_priority_sectors.name: Infrastructure & Priority Sectors Funding
infrastructure_priority_sectors.description: Financing for major infrastructure and critical sectors. Includes Sukuk bonds, Eurobonds, sovereign debt for rail/power projects, and infrastructure funds.

nigeria_fiscal_terms.name: Nigeria-Specific Fiscal Terms
nigeria_fiscal_terms.description: Specific terminology related to Nigerian fiscal management. Includes FAAC (Federation Account Allocation Committee), budget deficit, debt servicing, and subsidy removal impact.
